name: flash-guard-mobile-tests
description: Playwright + Appium mobile tests for Flash Guard

scripts.test: npm run preflight && playwright test -c playwright.appium.config.ts
scripts.test:auth: npm run preflight && playwright test -c playwright.appium.config.ts specs/auth.spec.ts
scripts.test:dashboard: npm run preflight && playwright test -c playwright.appium.config.ts specs/dashboard.spec.ts
scripts.test:balance-history: npm run preflight && playwright test -c playwright.appium.config.ts specs/balance-history.spec.ts
scripts.test:transfer: npm run preflight && playwright test -c playwright.appium.config.ts specs/transfer.spec.ts
